ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  Hilton Metal Forging Limited's board has approved raising up to ₹100 Crores through a Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) of equity shares, pending shareholder approval at an Extra Ordinary General Meeting on July 13, 2026. This move will dilute existing shareholder equity but inject significant capital into the company, though the specific use of these substantial proceeds is not disclosed in this announcement.
